title: [architect] Resolve meta plugin canonical source identity
objective: Resolve and, if FlexNetOS/meta is canonical, repair the plugin/marketplace source ambiguity where Codex cache and marketplace metadata point at `gitkb/meta` while this environment treats `FlexNetOS/meta` as local source of truth.
acceptance_criteria: Decision artifact states whether `FlexNetOS/meta`, `gitkb/meta`, or another repo is canonical for this environment.
If FlexNetOS/meta is canonical, source marketplace/plugin metadata is updated or a follow-up implementation PR is created with parity proof.
Codex/Claude parity checks use the canonical source decision and no longer leave plugin package identity ambiguous.
No plugin metadata is changed without proving equivalent behavior or documenting the migration path.

source_gap_audit.reason: Expanded from .handoff/.idea intent after the initial TASK-PRR set proved too broad.
